final_text: Q: Writing in NSView I am trying to render text in a NSView canvas. I need to write three lines of text and ignore what 's beyond. String.draw ( in: withAttributes ) with a provided rect seems perfect to do it. My code looks like this: func renderText ( _ string: String, x: Double, y: Double, numberOfLines: Int, withColor color: Color ) - > Double { let font = NSFont.boldSystemFont ( ofSize: 11 ) let lineHeight = Double ( font.ascender + abs ( font.descender ) + font.leading ) let textHeight = lineHeight * Double ( numberOfLines ) + font.leading // three lines let textRect = NSRect ( x: x, y: y, width: 190, height: textHeight ) string.draw ( in: textRect, withAttributes: [ NSFontAttributeName: font, NSForegroundColorAttributeName: color ] ) return textHeight } renderText ( `` Lorem ipsum... '', x: 100, y: 100, numberOfLines: 3, withColor: NSColor.white ) Without adjustments, I get only two lines of text rendered: I am following these guidelines: https: //developer.apple.com/library/content/documentation/TextFonts/Conceptual/CocoaTextArchitecture/FontHandling/FontHandling.html # I am missing something?

prompt_text: Antibodies to streptococcal opacity factor in a selected Indian population. Antibody to at least one type of streptococcal opacity factor (OF) was present in 39.0% of 235 selected subjects and, in 47.8% of these, to more than one type. Only 21.6% of children less than 4 years old had antibody to OF; these were to one type in 62.5% or to more than one in 37.5%. In the study group as a whole, the commonest antibodies were those to OF from M-serotype 25 followed, in descending order, by serotypes 4, 22, 2, 9, 48, 49, 28, 61 and 75.

prompt_text:
Chilpancingo National Airport

The Chilpancingo National Airport is an airport located in the city of Chilpancingo, Guerrero, México. The airport serves General Aviation for the Capital of Guerrero, as there are currently no national air carriers operating at the airport. The ICAO airport code is MMCH, but it does not have an IATA code yet.
base_text:
Chilpancingo National Airport

The Chilpancingo National Airport is an airport located in the city of Chilpancingo, Guerrero, México. The airport serves General Aviation for the Capital of Guerrero, as there are currently no national air carriers operating at the airport. The ICAO airport code is MMCH, but it does not have an IATA code yet. The airport plays a crucial role in connecting the region to other parts of Mexico, particularly for private flights, medical evacuations, and regional cargo operations. Due to its strategic location, it also serves as a backup facility for nearby airports during adverse weather conditions.
final_text:

prompt_text: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — An attorney who was fired by the court-supervised administrator of BP’s settlement with Gulf Coast businesses and residents is demanding to be reinstated with back pay. In a letter to claims administrator Patrick Juneau last Friday, Christine Reitano’s lawyer said her contract for working on the settlement program was “wrongfully and improperly” terminated. Reitano’s husband, Lionel Sutton III, also worked as an attorney for the program before resigning in June. In July, U.S. District Judge Carl Barbier appointed former FBI Director Louis Freeh to investigate allegations that Sutton received a portion of settlement proceeds for claims he referred to a law firm before joining Juneau’s staff.
base_text: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — An attorney who was fired by the court-supervised administrator of BP’s settlement with Gulf Coast businesses and residents is demanding to be reinstated with back pay. In a letter to claims administrator Patrick Juneau last Friday, Christine Reitano’s lawyer said her contract for working on the settlement program was “wrongfully and improperly” terminated. Reitano’s husband, Lionel Sutton III, also worked as an attorney for the program before resigning in June. In July, U.S. District Judge Carl Barbier appointed former FBI Director Louis Freeh to investigate allegations that Sutton received a portion of settlement proceeds for claims he referred to a law firm before joining Juneau’s staff.
final_text: ORLEANS ( AP ) — An attorney who was fired by the court-supervised administrator of BP ’ s settlement with Gulf Coast businesses and residents is demanding to be reinstated with back pay. In a letter to claims administrator Patrick Juneau last Friday, Christine Reitano ’ s lawyer said her contract for working on the settlement program was “ wrongfully and improperly ” terminated. Reitano ’ s husband, Lionel Sutton III, also worked as an attorney for the program before resigning in June. In July, U.S. District Judge Carl Barbier appointed former FBI Director Louis Freeh to investigate allegations that Sutton received a portion of settlement proceeds for claims he referred to a law firm before joining Juneau ’ staff.

label: ai
prompt_text:
Primer remodeling amplification-activated multisite-catalytic hairpin assembly enabling the concurrent formation of Y-shaped DNA nanotorches for the fluorescence assay of ochratoxin A.
DNA can be configured into unique high-order structures due to its significantly high programmability, such as a three-way junction-based structure (denoted Y-shaped DNA), for further applications. Herein, we report a label-free fluorescent signal-on biosensor based on the target-driven primer remodeling rolling circle amplification (RCA)-activated multisite-catalytic hairpin assembly (CHA) enabling the concurrent formation of Y-shaped DNA nanotorches (Y-DNTs) for ultrasensitive detection of ochratoxin A (OTA). Two kinds of masterfully-designed probes, termed Complex I and II, were pre-prepared by the combination of a circular template (CT) with an OTA aptamer (S1), a substrate probe (S2) and hairpin probe 1 (HP1), respectively.

Two kinds of masterfully-designed probes, termed Complex I and II, were pre-prepared by the combination of a circular template (CT) with an OTA aptamer (S1), a substrate probe (S2) and hairpin probe 1 (HP1), respectively.

prompt_text: Peripheral pyogenic arthritis. A study of one hundred seventy-nine cases. A retrospective medical record-based study of cases of peripheral pyogenic arthritis diagnosed in a rheumatology department between 1966 and 1993 was conducted.
base_text: Peripheral pyogenic arthritis. A study of one hundred seventy-nine cases. A retrospective medical record-based study of cases of peripheral pyogenic arthritis diagnosed in a rheumatology department between 1966 and 1993 was conducted. The study aimed to analyze the epidemiology, clinical features, diagnostic approaches, and outcomes of patients with peripheral pyogenic arthritis, a rare but potentially debilitating condition characterized by acute joint inflammation due to bacterial infection.
final_text: Peripheral pyogenic arthritis. A study of ond hundred seventy-nine cases. A retrospective medical record-based study of cases of peripheral pyogenic arthritis diagnosed in a rheumatology department between 1966 and 1993 was conducted. The study aimed to analyze the epidemiology, clinical features, diagnostic approaches, and outcomes of patients with peripheral pyogenic arthritis, a rare but potentially debilitating condition characterized by acute joint inflammation due to bacterial infection.

prompt_text:
BT is now trialling blazing 40Gbps broadband

All part of future-proofing BT’s broadband network

Shares

How fast can BT get with its fibre? Pretty darn fast if the company’s latest trial is anything to go by, with speeds of 40Gbps having been achieved. BT hooked up with Huawei to test out new broadband tech in what it called a European first, with an FTTP (fibre-to-the-premises) connection running between BT’s R&D centre at Adastral Park and the University of Suffolk seeing 40Gbps (‘NG-PON2’ tech), 10Gbps (‘XGS-PON’) and 2.5Gbps (‘GPON’) speeds being delivered simultaneously over one fibre cable.

label: ai
prompt_text:
Welcome to 2016: Eftpos glitch spreads

By Chris Zappone

The computer bug that brought Bank of Queensland's Eftpos transactions to a grinding halt in the first days of the New Year has hit other banks - including the Commonwealth Bank-owned BankWest. The glitch, which started on January 1, left Australian retailers struggling to perform routine electronic point-of-sale transactions.
base_text:
Welcome to 2016: Eftpos glitch spreads

By Chris Zappone

The computer bug that brought Bank of Queensland's Eftpos transactions to a grinding halt in the first days of the New Year has hit other banks - including the Commonwealth Bank-owned BankWest. The glitch, which started on January 1, left Australian retailers struggling to perform routine electronic point-of-sale transactions. The Australian Payments Network (AusPayNet), which operates the Eftpos system, confirmed the issue stemmed from a software update rolled out overnight on New Year's Eve.
final_text:
Welcome to 2016: Eftpos glitch spreads

By Chris Zappone

The computer bug that brought Bank of Queensland's Eftpos transactions to a grinding halt in the first days of the New Year has hit other banks - including the Commonwealth Bank-owned BankWest. The glitch, which started on January 1, left Australian retailers struggling to perform routine electronic point-of-sale transactions. The Australian Payments Network (AusPayNet), which operates the Eftpos system, confirmed the issue stemmed from a software update rolled out overnight on New Year's Eve.

label: ai
prompt_text: Increasing the signal to noise ratio (SNR) of audio systems is generally motivated by a desire to increase the speech intelligibility in a noisy environment, for purposes of voice communications and machine-control via automatic speech recognition. A common system to increase SNR is using directional enhancement systems, such as the “beam-forming” systems. Beamforming or “spatial filtering” is a signal processing technique used in sensor arrays for directional signal transmission or reception.
base_text: Increasing the signal to noise ratio (SNR) of audio systems is generally motivated by a desire to increase the speech intelligibility in a noisy environment, for purposes of voice communications and machine-control via automatic speech recognition. A common system to increase SNR is using directional enhancement systems, such as the “beam-forming” systems. Beamforming or “spatial filtering” is a signal processing technique used in sensor arrays for directional signal transmission or reception. This technique works by combining signals from multiple microphones (or other sensors) in a way that amplifies the desired sound source while attenuating noise from other directions.
final_text: Increasing the signal to noise ratio (SNR) of audio systems is generallY motivated by a desire to increase the speuch intelligibility in a noisy environment, for purposes of voice communications and machine-control via automatic speech recognition. A common system to increase SNR is using directional enhancement systems, such as the “beam-forming” systems. Beamforming or “spatial filtering” is a signal processing technique used in sensor arrays for directional signal transmission or reception. This technique works by combining signals from multiple microphones (or other sensors) in a way that amplifies the desired sound source while attenuating noise from other directions.

prompt_text:
\page disk_monitor Disk Monitor

The disk monitor node is responsible for reporting disk information. One instance will run on the LLP and another will run on the MLP. It uses the file pathnames specified in the disk\_monitor.config file to retrive information on the filesystems that contain those files.
base_text:
\page disk_monitor Disk Monitor

The disk monitor node is responsible for reporting disk information. One instance will run on the LLP and another will run on the MLP. It uses the file pathnames specified in the disk\_monitor.config file to retrive information on the filesystems that contain those files. The configuration file typically includes parameters such as the target filesystem paths, polling intervals, and thresholds for alerting when disk usage exceeds specified limits. The node periodically scans the designated filesystems, collecting metrics like total capacity, used space, available space, and inode utilization.
final_text:
\page disk_monitor Disk Monitor

The disk monitor node is responsible for reporting disk information. One instance wil run on the LLP and another will run on the MLP. It uses the file pathnames specified in the disk\_monitor.config file to retrive information on the filesystems that contain thosr files. The configuration file typically includes parameters such as the target filesystem paths, polling intervals, and thresholds for alerting when disk usage exceeds specified limits. The node periodically scans the designated filesystems, collecting metrics like total capacity, used space, available space, and inode utilization.

prompt_text: Analysis of sagittal condylar path inclination in consideration of Fischer's angle. This study investigated the sagittal condylar path during protrusive and lateral excursions by analysing the actually measured jaw movement data and re-evaluated the setting of the sagittal condylar path inclination in consideration of Fischer's angle. Protrusive and lateral excursions of 10 healthy subjects were measured using a three-dimensional mandibular movement analysing system. Condylar path inclinations at the hinge-axis point and the corresponding external point laterally extending from the condyle were evaluated in the sagittal plane.

prompt_text:
Friday, September 29, 2006

Some people aren't going down

"Under this legislation, our clients at Guantanamo and hundreds of others detained by the U.S. around the world may remain locked up for the rest of their lives without ever having a chance to prove their innocence. Congress will be forfeiting one of the founding principles of the democratic tradition, and one of the most basic checks on executive power.
base_text:
Friday, September 29, 2006

Some people aren't going down

"Under this legislation, our clients at Guantanamo and hundreds of others detained by the U.S. around the world may remain locked up for the rest of their lives without ever having a chance to prove their innocence. Congress will be forfeiting one of the founding principles of the democratic tradition, and one of the most basic checks on executive power. The erosion of due process in this manner sets a dangerous precedent, undermining the very foundations of justice that our nation was built upon. It sends a message to those who hold power that they can act with impunity, bypassing the safeguards that have long protected the rights of individuals, even those accused of the most heinous crimes. This is not just a failure of legislation—it is a betrayal of the values that define us as a people.
final_text:
